claims.claim: PULVINI/HENDRIX-Φ mining performance, ASIC-efficiency, accepted-share, and revenue claims are not externally validated yet.
claims.validation_environment: Mac Studio M3 Ultra (Darwin arm64), Python 3.12.7, NumPy 2.4.6
boundaries: No accepted-share or pool-side hashrate claim without pool evidence
No Antminer S21 superiority claim without comparable measured evidence
No universal random-search speedup claim; high-entropy SHA-256 search remains bounded by the Deutsch/exponential-wall framing
No commercialization before Stage 2 firmware/hardware integration evidence is present
No production SLA, warranty, or sovereign mining claim before Stage 3 field-trial evidence is present

phi_search_vs_random.summary: φ-guided ordering reaches valid nonces no later than sequential; finds high-resonance nonces faster; complete permutation; Voronoi domains deterministic; gradient proposals within uint32 bounds; solver respects configured range; search deterministic for same target/range

autonomous_mining_agent.summary: PYTHIA autonomous lifecycle submits verified share; plan is structured (not Grover)

validation_blockers: 2026-06-20 RESOLVED: NumPy validation gate unblocked. NumPy 2.4.6 installed via pip under pyenv Python 3.12.7 on Darwin arm64. All capability benchmarks pass.
2026-06-20 REMAINING: No real/testnet header fixture; no actual double-SHA-256 nonce loop; no pool-side accepted-share evidence. Mining remains HYPOTHETICAL until these are addressed.
